body: [{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Release Version","bold":true},{"text":": 6.125"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Minor Improvements","bold":true}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Apple and Google Pay (web payments) can now include a surcharge."}]}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Bug Fixes","bold":true}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue where some API shipping rates gave inconsistent costs when a discount code was applied to the checkout."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Fixed a bug when checking out with AfterPay, and the error message \"Requires Agreement To Terms\" would display."}]}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]}]
